samples.gvd:
module fsm
(
    input IN,
    input CLK,
    input RST,
    output reg MATCH
);

reg [2:0] state, next_state;

parameter S0 = 3'b000, S1 = 3'b001, S2 = 3'b010, S3 = 3'b011, S4 = 3'b100, S5 = 3'b101, S6 = 3'b110, S7 = 3'b111;

always @(posedge CLK or posedge RST) begin
    if (RST) begin
        state <= S0;
        MATCH <= 1'b0;
    end
    else begin
        state <= next_state;
        case (state)
            S0: begin
                if (IN) begin
                    next_state <= S1;
                end
                else begin
                    next_state <= S0;
                end
            end
            S1: begin
                if (IN) begin
                    next_state <= S1;
                end
                else begin
                    next_state <= S2;
                end
            end
            S2: begin
                if (IN) begin
                    next_state <= S1;
                end
                else begin
                    next_state <= S3;
                end
            end
            S3: begin
                if (IN) begin
                    next_state <= S4;
                end
                else begin
                    next_state <= S0;
                end
            end
            S4: begin
                if (IN) begin
                    next_state <= S1;
                    MATCH <= 1'b1;
                end
                else begin
                    next_state <= S0;
                end
            end
            default: begin
                next_state <= S0;
            end
        endcase
    end
end

endmodule
samples.xml_description:
<module id="fsm">
    <description>Implement a Mealy FSM detection circuit that detects a single-bit input IN. When the input is 10011, output MATCH is 1, and MATCH is 0 in other cases. Support for continuous input and loop detection.</description>
    <ports>
        <input id="IN">Input signal to the FSM.</input>
        <input id="CLK">Clock signal used for synchronous operation.</input>
        <input id="RST">Reset signal to initialize the FSM.</input>
        <output id="MATCH">Output signal indicating a match condition based on the FSM state.</output>
    </ports>
    <parameter_description>
        <parameter id="S0">Initial state of the FSM.</parameter>
        <parameter id="S1">State of the FSM when the input is 1.</parameter>
        <parameter id="S2">State of the FSM when the input is 0.</parameter>
        <parameter id="S3">State of the FSM when the input is 1.</parameter>
        <parameter id="S4">State of the FSM when the input is 1.</parameter>
        <parameter id="S5">State of the FSM when the input is 0.</parameter>
        <parameter id="S6">State of the FSM when the input is 0.</parameter>
        <parameter id="S7">State of the FSM when the input is 1.</parameter>
        <parameter id="S8">State of the FSM when the input is 1.</parameter>
    </parameter_description>
    <logic_description>
        <reg id="state" type="sequential_logic">Current state of the FSM.</reg>
        <reg id="next_state" type="sequential_logic">Next state of the FSM.</reg>
        <reg id="match_reg" type="sequential_logic">Register to store the MATCH output.</reg>
    </logic_description>
    <implementation>
        <sequential_logic>
            <always description="Sequential logic block triggered on the positive edge of the clock or the positive edge of reset">
                <if description="If the reset signal is active">
                    <then description="Reset the state and MATCH output to the initial state and 0, respectively">
                        <assign description="Assign the initial state to the state variable" code="state = S0;"/>
                        <assign description="Assign 0 to the MATCH output" code="match_reg = 0;"/>
                    </then>
                    <else description="If the reset signal is not active">
                        <if description="If the input signal is 1">
                            <then description="Update the state and MATCH output based on the current state">
                                <assign description="Assign the next state to the state variable" code="state = next_state;"/>
                                <assign description="Assign the MATCH output based on the current state" code="match_reg = (state == S8) ? 1 : 0;"/>
                            </then>
                        </if>
                        <else description="If the input signal is not 1">
                            <if description="If the input signal is 0">
                                <then description="Update the state and MATCH output based on the current state">
                                    <assign description="Assign the next state to the state variable" code="state = next_state;"/>
                                    <assign description="Assign the MATCH output based on the current state" code="match_reg = (state == S6) ? 1 : 0;"/>
                                </then>
                            </if>
                            <else description="If the input signal is not 0">
                                <assign description="Assign the next state to the state variable" code="state = next_state;"/>
                                <assign description="Assign the MATCH output based on the current state" code="match_reg = (state == S4) ? 1 : 0;"/>
                            </else>
                        </else>
                    </else>
                </if>
            </always>
        </sequential_logic>
        <combinational_logic>
            <always description="Combinational logic block triggered on changes to the state or input signal">
                <case description="Case statement to determine the next state based on the current state and input signal">
                    <case_item description="Case item for the initial state">
                        <condition description="Condition for the initial state" code="state == S0;"/>
                        <action description="Action for the initial state">
                            <if description="If the input signal is 1">
                                <then description="Update the next state to S1">
                                    <assign description="Assign S1 to the next state variable" code="next_state = S1;"/>
                                </then>
                                <else description="If the input signal is not 1">
                                    <assign description="Assign S0 to the next state variable" code="next_state = S0;"/>
                                </else>
                            </action>
                        </condition>
                    </case_item>
                    <case_item description="Case item for state S1">
                        <condition description="Condition for state S1" code="state == S1;"/>
                        <action description="Action for state S1">
                            <if description="If the input signal is 1">
                                <then description="Update the next state to S1">
                                    <assign description="Assign S1 to the next state variable" code="next_state = S1;"/>
                                </then>
                                <else description="If the input signal is not 1">
                                    <assign description="Assign S2 to the next state variable" code="next_state = S2;"/>
                                </else>
                            </action>
                        </condition>
                    </case_item>
                    <case_item description="Case item for state S2">
                        <condition description="Condition for state S2" code="state == S2;"/>
                        <action description="Action for state S2">
                            <if description="If the input signal is 1">
                                <then description="Update the next state to S3">
                                    <assign description="Assign S3 to the next state variable" code="next_state = S3;"/>
                                </then>
                                <else description="If the input signal is not 1">
                                    <assign description="Assign S0 to the next state variable" code="next_state = S0;"/>
                                </else>
                            </action>
                        </condition>
                    </case_item>
                    <case_item description="Case item for state S3">
                        <condition description="Condition for state S3" code="state == S3;"/>
                        <action description="Action for state S3">
                            <if description="If the input signal is 1">
                                <then description="Update the next state to S1">
                                    <assign description="Assign S1 to the next state variable" code="next_state = S1;"/>
                                </then>
                                <else description="If the input signal is not 1">
                                    <assign description="Assign S4 to the next state variable" code="next_state = S4;"/>
                                </else>
                            </action>
                        </condition>
                    </case_item>
                    <case_item description="Case item for state S4">
                        <condition description="Condition for state S4" code="state == S4;"/>
                        <action description="Action for state S4">
                            <if description="If the input signal is 1">
                                <then description="Update the next state to S3">
                                    <assign description="Assign S3 to the next state variable" code="next_state = S3;"/>
                                </then>
                                <else description="If the input signal is not 1">
                                    <assign description="Assign S5 to the next state variable" code="next_state = S5;"/>
                                </else>
                            </action>
                        </condition>
                    </case_item>
                    <case_item description="Case item for state S5">
                        <condition description="Condition for state S5" code="state == S5;"/>
                        <action description="Action for state S5">
                            <if description="If the input signal is 1">
                                <then description="Update the next state to S3">
                                    <assign description="Assign S3 to the next state variable" code="next_state = S3;"/>
                                </then>
                                <else description="If the input signal is not 1">
                                    <assign description="Assign S6 to the next state variable" code="next_state = S6;"/>
                                </else>
                            </action>
                        </condition>
                    </case_item>
                    <case_item description="Case item for state S6">
                        <condition description="Condition for state S6" code="state == S6;"/>
                        <action description="Action for state S6">
                            <if description="If the input signal is 1">
                                <then description="Update the next state to S7">
                                    <assign description="Assign S7 to the next state variable" code="next_state = S7;"/>
                                </then>
                                <else description="If the input signal is not 1">
                                    <assign description="Assign S0 to the next state variable" code="next_state = S0;"/>
                                </else>
                            </action>
                        </condition>
                    </case_item>
                    <case_item description="Case item for state S7">
                        <condition description="Condition for state S7" code="state == S7;"/>
                        <action description="Action for state S7">
                            <if description="If the input signal is 1">
                                <then description="Update the next state to S1">
                                    <assign description="Assign S1 to the next state variable" code="next_state = S1;"/>
                                </then>
                                <else description="If the input signal is not 1">
                                    <assign description="Assign S8 to the next
